errorPage.defaultMessage: Something went wrong. Try reloading the page...

footer.collaboration: {{appName}} is a free career guidance tool offered by the Zambia Ministry of Technology and Science, built in partnership with the World Bank Group and Tabiya.

dashboard.sectionTitle: Administrator dashboard — cross-institutional monitoring and analytics

header.school: TEVETA — Technical Education, Vocational and Entrepreneurship Training Authority

dailyAdoptionTrend.title: Daily Adoption Trend
dailyAdoptionTrend.titleTooltip: New registrations and daily active users over the past 7 days. Helps track whether adoption is growing day to day.

stats.institutionsActiveTooltip: Pilot institutions that have at least one student registered on {{appName}}.
stats.totalStudentsRegisteredTooltip: All students who have created a {{appName}} account to date, across every institution.
stats.activeStudents7DaysTooltip: Students who logged in or interacted with {{appName}} in the past 7 days.

titles.skillsDiscoveryTooltip: Build Your Profile: students share past experiences and {{appName}} extracts a profile of their skills.
titles.careerReadinessTooltip: Job Readiness module: students work through CV, cover letter, interview prep, and other job-readiness sub-modules.
titles.careerExplorerTooltip: Career Explorer module: students browse occupations matched to their skills and interests.

modules.coverLetterMotivation: Drafting cover letters and motivation statements
modules.workplaceReadiness: Preparing to start a new job: workplace readiness

skillsAnalytics.supplyVsDemandTitle: Skills Supply vs Labour Market Demand
skillsAnalytics.supplyVsDemandTitleTooltip: Top skills students already have (supply) versus the skills employers most often ask for in job postings (demand).
skillsAnalytics.topSkillsInDemandCaption: Based on {{withSkills}} of {{total}} postings · {{pct}}% had no taxonomy-linked skill
skillsAnalytics.topSkillsInDemandCaptionTooltip: Only skills linked to the skills taxonomy are ranked. The remaining postings had no linked skill — none were detected, or detected phrases could not be matched to the taxonomy — so they are excluded from this ranking. Counts reflect the selected Province and Sector; Sector is approximated from job-posting categories.
skillsAnalytics.gapBySectorTitleTooltip: Difference between the skills students have and the skills employers ask for, broken down by sector.
skillsAnalytics.avgGapLabel: Avg. gap between student skills supply and labour market demand

stats.jobsSourcedTooltip: Total job postings collected from supported job platforms.
stats.sectorsCoveredTooltip: Number of distinct sectors represented across the collected job postings.
stats.sourcePlatformsTooltip: Number of distinct job-board platforms feeding the dataset.

instructorDashboard.sectionTitle: Instructor dashboard — monitor student engagement and progress

stats.totalStudentsRegisteredTooltip: Students from your institution who have created a {{appName}} account.
stats.activeStudents7DaysTooltip: Students from your institution who logged in or interacted with {{appName}} in the past 7 days.

studentsTable.empty: No students match the current filters.
